note: Reserved for human-entered local policy choices. This file should not be overwritten automatically once decisions are added. Source-backed public council decisions may be entered manually when the decision document is ingested; D6 classification remains a separate validation field.

decisions.decision_title: Raadsvoorstel Stevige Lokale Teams en inzet Investeringsfonds jeugd en gezin geamendeerd aangenomen
decisions.open_issue: This records the public council decision route. It does not by itself settle whether Stevige Lokale Teams are formal D6 infrastructure, adjacent infrastructure, candidate infrastructure or outside D6 scope.
